zoneName: 艾欧尼亚 · 完整版 (36 chunks, zone-graph mode)
zoneIdentity: Ionia from League of Legends — the post-Noxian-invasion era of the First Lands. Eastern fantasy ink-and-wash illustration aesthetic with rich pastel palette: jade green, cherry pink, mist white, weathered wood brown, lantern gold. Painterly top-down to high-angle 60-90° view. Soft watercolor edges, ambient golden-hour lighting, atmospheric mist. Building style: low Eastern wood-and-paper architecture with multi-tier curved roofs, frequently shown in cross-section (no roof, low walls, interior visible). Terrain mix: bamboo groves, pine forests, cherry blossoms, rice paddies, stone-paved paths, slow rivers, paper lanterns, stone shrines, paper-lantern festivals, distant misty peaks. Mood: spiritually charged, recovering yet melancholic, with subtle scars of recent war. Each scene is its own beautiful illustration; visual variety across the zone is welcomed.
geographyLayout: Ionia is a south-elongated island nation. Center spine runs north (mountains: Bahrl + Shojin) → middle (Placidium of Navori, the spiritual capital) → south (Shon-Xan rice fields, Galrin Port). The eastern coast faces the Valoran mainland. Rivers flow generally toward the east. The northeast holds the Order of Shadow's hidden eyrie. The central-east hosts the Spirit Bough Crossing (a magical rift). The southwest is recovering war-scarred fishing villages. The southeast holds Galrin's busy harbor and a ruined battle-front belt.

chunks.content: Far-northwest open sea seen from above. Expansive misty ocean dominates the frame; in the upper right corner, the bases of the Bahrl mountains rise from the water with pine-clinging cliffs. A scattering of jagged rocks pokes out of the waves. A few drifting paper lanterns float on the swell. Distant flock of cranes implied as small painted silhouettes.

Northeastern misty sea. Steep dark cliffs occupy the left edge with pines clinging to their top; the rest of the frame is silvery sea fading into white mist. A handful of jagged sea-stacks rise from the water. The water has gentle, broken white-cap brushwork. A weathered shipwreck timber lies half-submerged.

Cluster of small wooded outer islands floating in a calm eastern sea. Each islet has a few pines or bamboo and an occasional moss-covered shrine. A shallow bay between two of the larger islets. The water reflects the sky in soft horizontal brushstrokes. Faint cherry-blossom hints on one distant islet.

interactiveElements.name: 孤岛神龛
interactiveElements.description: 无人小岛上的苔绿石龛

chunks.content: West-coast outer sea. Rugged black volcanic rocks at the right edge of the frame plunge into the surf, with a single small pebble cove. The rest of the frame is open misty sea. Driftwood scattered along the rocks. A weathered torii arch stands in the shallow water as a half-forgotten landmark. Crows wheel above as small silhouettes.

Southwestern open sea with a small fishing fleet. Two or three small wooden fishing boats with lateen-style sails ride the swell, set against a soft sunset glow on the horizon. Faint distant island silhouettes at the top of the frame. A scattering of paper lanterns drifting on the water near the bottom-right corner. Atmospheric, peaceful.

Southwestern rocky shoreline. The right side of the frame is a thin strip of pale-pebble beach with reeds and a few stray cherry-petals; the rest is shallow sea broken by black tidal rocks. A small upturned skiff lies on the sand being repaired. A weathered wooden marker post leans on the beach. The atmosphere is quiet, end-of-day.

interactiveElements.name: 翻覆船
interactiveElements.description: 翻在沙滩上修补中的小舟

chunks.content: Far-north bamboo ridge. Gnarled bamboo grows on hillsides cut by stone-paved switchback paths. Ancient stone obelisks half-swallowed by moss. Distant fog-veiled peaks above. A small wooden bell-tower stands on a saddle.

Mountaintop Vastayan tree-city: dozens of wooden tree-houses connected by rope bridges between massive ancient trees. A central platform with carved stone-monkey statue. A sweeping flag of woven leaves. The whole settlement is set into the canopy with mist below.

interactiveElements.name: 猴王座
interactiveElements.description: 悟空族的祖座，刻满故事

interactiveElements.name: 藤桥广场
interactiveElements.description: 树间藤桥交汇的中央平台

chunks.content: Steep ridgeline. A narrow stone path snakes along the spine of a mountain with deep mist-filled valleys to either side. A handful of pilgrim lanterns dot the path. A wayfarer's stone shrine occupies a small flat shoulder.

interactiveElements.name: 驿路神龛
interactiveElements.description: 刻着三角符文的旅人神龛

chunks.content: Cluster of jagged stone peaks above the cloud sea. Pines clinging to cliff faces. A ruined bird-shaped weather vane atop the highest spire. The light is silvery, the air thin.

Western seacoast: jagged black rocks, white surf, a single weathered fisherman's totem post wrapped in faded prayer flags. A rocky beach trail descends to the water. Distant gulls implied by their painted silhouettes.

interactiveElements.name: 渔人柱
interactiveElements.description: 缠满褪色祈福布的木柱

chunks.content: Dreamlike forest where reality bends. Trees are unusually tall and pale-leafed; the air glimmers with iridescent dust. A narrow stream flows through it carrying fallen petals. Strange phosphorescent flowers glow at the bases of the largest trees. The composition is hauntingly beautiful, dream-tinted.

interactiveElements.name: 梦境之树
interactiveElements.description: 中央巨树，叶片半透明发光

chunks.content: Pine-cloaked mountain road climbing toward the monastery. Stone steps cut into the slope. Wind chimes hung between trees. A small circular meditation platform with a single bonsai. Wisps of fog drift between trunks.

Mountaintop sword-style monastery. Several wooden cross-section halls (no roofs, you can see the interior — wooden floors, training racks, scrolls) arranged around a central windswept courtyard. A great upright sword-stone monument in the courtyard. A waterfall plummets off the edge to the right of the temple.

interactiveElements.name: 断剑碑
interactiveElements.description: 巨大的断剑石碑，纪念坠剑亡者

chunks.content: Hidden cliffside hideout of the Order of Shadow. A series of dark wooden platforms and ladders pinned to a sheer rock face, partially obscured by trees. A black banner with red trim. Training dummies arranged at the base. The light is colder, more shadow-heavy than the rest of the zone.

Cliff-top tiny fishing market. A handful of wooden stalls on the bluff overlooking the sea, drying fish lines, a hauling crane. A wooden platform extends out over the surf. A single stone path winds inland from here.

Cherry-blossom corridor cut by a wide stone path heading south. Pink petals drift through the air and lie thick on the ground. A solitary stone bench by a calm pond reflects the canopy. A deer-shaped stone lantern half-buried in petals.

Heart of the Placidium of Navori. A grand multi-tier wooden temple (cross-section, low walls, interior shows wooden pews and a sacred altar) sits at center, surrounded by a stone-paved circular courtyard. Four roads radiate outward in a perfect cross. Bamboo stands at the four cardinal points, cherry blossoms scatter at the corners. The atmosphere is sacred and quietly recovering.

A path leading east from Placidium toward the spirit rift. The trees lean weirdly here, leaves shimmering in unnatural pastel hues. Glowing motes drift through the air. A few stone wayfarer markers carved with crescents.
A wide bamboo grove broken by a small clear stream. A mossy stone bridge crosses the stream. A pair of stone lanterns flank the bridge. Fireflies drift in the dimness under the bamboo.
Dense pine forest near the eastern coast. A single old hunter's cabin (cross-section: roof off, simple wooden interior with a hearth) stands in a small clearing. Wood smoke curls up.

interactiveElements.name: 猎人小屋
interactiveElements.description: 破旧但有烟火气的小木屋，可入

chunks.content: Western cliff lookout. A wooden viewing platform on stilts hangs over the seacliff. A weathered stone bench. The sea below is rendered with soft white-capped waves. Cherry petals occasionally drift by even though the trees are out of frame.

A patch of land scarred by leaking spirit energy. The grass is silvered, a few trees are partially translucent / overlapped with their dream-versions. A faint purple haze hangs over everything. Stone wards have been planted in a circle to contain whatever lives here.

Western district of the Placidium: a partially rebuilt market with paper-lantern stalls — tea house, calligraphy shop, herb stand, all shown cross-section so interiors are visible. A few stone walls being repaired. Lanterns string between buildings. A dirt road exits toward the Placidium's central plaza.

Spirit Bough Crossing — a magical rift in reality. A grove of pale spirit trees encircles a glowing pool of mist where the spirit world bleeds through. Floating ribbons of light. Paper-lantern offerings drift in the air. A single wooden torii arch marks the threshold. The most magical, otherworldly scene in the zone.

interactiveElements.name: 灵会香坛
interactiveElements.description: 悬浮的香炉，飘着香烟和符纸

chunks.content: Vastayan resistance hideout deep in the canopy. Multiple wooden treetop platforms connected by rope bridges high above the forest floor. Feather charms hang from every railing. A central practice ground with a target wall. The light filters down through the canopy in dappled shafts.

interactiveElements.name: 高台栖巢
interactiveElements.description: 霞与洛常驻的羽族栖巢

chunks.content: Quiet east-forest road heading south. Birch and maple mix; autumn has subtly arrived here, with a few golden leaves. A simple wooden bridge crosses a stream. A small stone way-marker post points two directions.

Coastal fishing village still bearing scars of the Noxian invasion. Several burned-out husks of houses sit beside still-standing thatched cottages. A central stone monument lists names. White prayer flags flutter above broken walls. A single dock with a small fishing boat moored to it. The atmosphere is melancholic but resolute.

interactiveElements.name: 诺战纪念碑
interactiveElements.description: 刻满阵亡者名字的石碑

interactiveElements.name: 破屋
interactiveElements.description: 焚毁后只剩骨架的屋子

chunks.content: Southern wing of the Placidium — a memorial plaza dominated by the broken outer wall left as a relic of the war. Standing stones with carved names line a stone path. Withered flower wreaths and white cloth offerings cover the bases. A single bell on a wooden frame, rung in mourning. Atmospheric, somber.

Kinkou Temple of Balance, hidden in a dense bamboo grove. A multi-tier wooden hall (cross-section) sits beside a perfectly still circular reflecting pool. Smaller meditation huts dot the grove around it. Twin stone lanterns flank the entrance path. The atmosphere is hushed, perfectly balanced.

Edge of the spirit-touched forest. The path passes between subtle wards — a row of small stone foxes. The mist deepens to the west, the mundane light strengthens to the east. A stream cuts diagonally across the scene.

Wider mixed forest hosting a small farmstead. A single thatched-roof farmhouse (this one IS roofed, scenery only) with a fenced kitchen garden. Smoke curls from a stone chimney. A pumpkin patch and a clothesline complete the rural feel.

Western rice paddies arranged in geometric patches with raised dirt boundaries. A wooden waterwheel turns slowly beside an irrigation channel. A scarecrow in a straw hat. A single farmer's hut at the edge.

Yasuo's home village set in golden rice paddies. A small cluster of cross-section wooden cottages, a wide central path, and a stone shrine where Yasuo's brother is honored. A lone weathered straw hat hangs on a fence post. Wind ripples the rice. The sky has a melancholy gold tint.

Wide rice paddies with the main southern road running through. A small stone war memorial with white prayer flags by the road. A wooden cart abandoned by a paddy edge. A bamboo grove on the east side.

Terraced rice paddies stepping down a hillside toward the eastern coast. Small irrigation channels glint between terraces. A path zigzags down. At the bottom, the path joins a coastal road heading toward the harbor.

Galrin Port — busy commercial harbor. Several wooden docks reach into the bay. Ships of varied design (small fishing boats, larger merchant junks). A central plaza with paper lanterns strung overhead. Cross-section buildings include a tea house, a smuggler's tavern, a warehouse stacked with crates. A stone lighthouse stands on the headland.

interactiveElements.name: 走私酒馆
interactiveElements.description: 海盗常出没的酒馆，可入

chunks.content: Southern rocky beach. Black volcanic rocks, white surf, scattered tide pools. A single wrecked fishing boat lies hull-up on the shore. Driftwood is piled in places.

Itinerant performers' camp by the southern road. A circular cluster of canvas tents in muted reds and yellows. A central stage with paper lanterns strung above it. A wooden caravan with painted side panels. A campfire ring with a tea kettle on it.
Long sweeping beach with paddies meeting sand. A wooden pier extends into the water. A few overturned boats being repaired on the sand. A coastal path traces the shoreline.

Battle-scarred frontier zone south of Placidium. Burnt earth in patches, broken pieces of armor and Noxian banners half-buried, a ruined siege catapult tipped on its side. Wildflowers are starting to reclaim the soil. A single broken-arrow monument.

Inland approach to Galrin Port still showing battle scars. A burnt warehouse, rebuilt with patches of new wood. A pile of cannon balls left over from the war. A stone obelisk listing the names of those who held the harbor. A barrel cart on the road.

interactiveElements.name: 守港碑
interactiveElements.description: 纪念守港之战的方尖碑
